content.problemStatement:
Let's call a sequence good if the sum of all its elements is 000.

You have a sequence of integers A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​. You may perform any number of operations on this sequence (including zero). In one operation, you should choose a valid index iii and decrease AiA_iAi​ by iii. Can you make the sequence good using these operations?
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains a single integer NNN.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing the string `"YES"` if it is possible to make the given sequence good or `"NO"` if it is impossible.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Example case 2: We can perform two operations ? subtract 111 from A1A_1A1​ and 222 from A2A_2A2​.
